name: skykick-mcp
description: Fleet-wide M365 backup assurance for SkyKick Cloud Backup - posture, stale snapshots, and coverage gaps no portal or wrapper can show.

skykick_client_id.title: SKYKICK_CLIENT_ID
skykick_client_id.description: Sets SKYKICK_CLIENT_ID for the SkyKick MCP server.

skykick_client_secret.title: SKYKICK_CLIENT_SECRET
skykick_client_secret.description: Sets SKYKICK_CLIENT_SECRET for the SkyKick MCP server.

skykick_oauth_scope.title: SKYKICK_OAUTH_SCOPE
skykick_oauth_scope.description: Sets SKYKICK_OAUTH_SCOPE for the SkyKick MCP server. Required by the generated client for credential refresh or hand-written auth flow.
